titleStmt.title: SII 27.118: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 118. (A.R. No. 508 of 1928-29.) KŌṬE, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the prākāra of Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1362, Raudri, Pushya ba. 30, Ardhōdaya, solar eclipse corresponding to 1441 A.D., January 23 when the weekday was Monday.

It registers a gift of land, purchased for 15 kāṭi gadyāṇas, to god Mahādēva of the hiriya-dēvālya at Kōṭa, for morning worship and offerings during the festival of pavitrārōpaṇa by mahāpradhāna Chaṇḍarasa who was governing Bārakūru-Tuḷu-rājya, for the welfare of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrī sarasvatyāyēṁ namaḥ śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ nirvighnamastu nama
stuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śaka varuṣa 1362 neya raudri saṁvatsara
da puśya ba 30 lu śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra pratāpa gājabēṁ
ṭekāṟa dēvarāya mahārāyaru vijayanagariya rājadhāniyalu sukhasaṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ sakala varṇāśrama dharmaṁgaḷanu pratipālisuva kāladalu Ā ma
hārāyara nirūpadiṁ mahāpradhāna caṁḍarasanu bārakūra tuḷurājyavanu pratipā
li suttihalli Ā dēvarāya mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda kōṭada grāmadoḷagaṇa hiriya
dēvālyada śrīmahādēvarige Amrutapaḍige prātaḥ kāladagosage Avasarada mosarō
garada nayivēdya pavitrārōpaṇada parvakke dēvarāya mahārāyarige Āyurārōgya Ayiśva
riyābhiUraddhiyāgabēkeṁdu Arddhōdaya sūriyōparāga puṁṇya kāladalu sahiraṁṇyōdaka
dānadhārā pūrvakavāgi gosageya Avasarada mosarōgarakke kāṭi ga 12 pavitrārōpaṇa
parvakke ga 3 Ubhayaṁ ga 15 Akṣaradalu kāṭihadinayidu hoṁnige koṭṭasthaḷa
madāhara ṭṭeya Ādivāsadavaru Aramanege teṟa siddhāya ga
lada bāḷina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu paḍuvalu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍavalu teṁkalu
yadoḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu mādhava mayyana nāraṇa
ḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu gōviṁda vayidyana rāghavana taṭṭinadāriyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁttī catussīmeya yiṁda Oḷage bittuva bījavari hāne 21
kuḷāgramūḍe 6 . mattu mūḍalu nāraṇa ṁ maṁṇeya teṁkana ga
lu teṁkalu mādhavamayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu rāma maṁṇe ya
kriṣṇamaṁṇeṁṇeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu nāraṇa bhaṭṭa gōviṁdavayidyana
yiṁda teṁkalu yaṁttī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa bittuva bījavari hāne 20 le
kuḷāgramūḍe 2 . mattu mūḍalu gujumayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gō
viṁda vayidyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu śivavayidyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
ramēśvara tuṁgara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yaṁttī catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage bittuva bījava
ri hā 20 lekada mū 1 hā 16 kaṁ kuḷāgra mū 1 hā 4 kaṁ dēvarige teṟuva
haraḷige karavara Þ mattū bāṟala Oḷage mūḍalu viṣṇu Ayidāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu sōmayājigaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu haḷi bhaṭṭara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍa
galu Ayidāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage bittuva bījavari hā 25
kuḷāgra hā 16 mattū maragōḍagadde 1 kaṁ bittu bījavari hā 10 kkaṁ kuḷāgra mū 1 A
ṁtu Anaṁtabhaṭṭaru teṟuvakuḷa mū 12 kuḷa bāḷa A saha koṭa
hoṁnige na tettu biṭṭaru Aramaneya siddhāyada hoṁnina Oḷage Uttarasikoṁḍu
dēvarige naḍasuva kaṭṭaḷe pratidina 1 kaṁ ṭṭada Akki da hāneyalu Oṁdaṟalekkade A
varuṣa 1 kaṁ prati mu 1 kaṁ hāḷira lekkade mū ṁ Akki mu 320 kkaṁ prati
sida Akki nāḍa hāneyalū hā 3 ra lekadalu kāṭiga 12 pavitrarōpaṇakke
ṭiga 3 Ubhayaṁ kā ga 15 Akṣaradalu kāṭi hadinayidu hoṁnanu Anaṁtta bhaṭṭara
hāyeṁṭṭu mūḍe kuḷāgrava bitti naḍasuvaru nālku mūḍe kuḷāgravanū Anaṁtta Udu
�nu bitti naḍasuvanu yivarugaḷu taṁma saṁtāna paraṁpare tappade kōṭada hiriyadēvālyada śrīmahā
dēvarige naḍasi bahalli yīdharṁmmada A pārupatyava māḍi �yo dharṁmmavanu Ācaṁdrārka
vāgi naḍasuva kartaru kōṭada hegaḍe �yo stānada mūli
grada rāghava sēnabōva yivarugaḷū taṁma saṁttāna paraṁpare
Anaṁttabhaṭṭara baresi kōṭṭu �yośāsana stavāda Akkiyanū
kōṭada hiriyadēvālyada śrīmahādēvarige gosageya Avasarada mosarōgara
da nayivēdya nūlaparvada pavitrārōpaṇada dharṁmavanū naḍasi Ā caṁdrārka sthāyiyāgi naḍasi
baharu yā mariyādeyalū śrī dēvarāya mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda caṁḍarasa Oḍeyaru
hiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvaka Ā caṁdrārka sthāyiyāgi naḍava mariyādeyalu
varu naḍasida śilāśāsana dānapālana yōrmmadhyē pālanaṁ tē dātāsvargga mavāpnō
ti pālanādacyutaṁpadaṁ svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yo harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi �yo śāsanakke māḍida dharṁmavanū Ārobbarū Aḷipidavaru vāraṇāsi
yali sāvira kavileya koṁda dōṣakke hōharu śrī triyaṁbaka
Digital edition of SII 27.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
